summary: Iteration 38 - Bloco 1: Multiempresa (tenant isolation) for ASTEC / VALE / CSN. 29/29 backend tests PASS. List endpoints correctly scope by organization_id (each org sees exactly its 1 ativo, 1 OS, 1 estoque item, 1 area; ASTEC sees 0 inspections as expected). Self-access works (admin can GET its own ativo/OS/estoque). Cross-org direct GET by id consistently returns 404 (not 403) across ativos, ordens-servico and estoque for all 3 orgs in every cross direction tested. Export /api/export/ativos is also org-scoped (XLSX parsed via openpyxl): contains ASTEC ativo and does NOT leak VALE/CSN names or IDs. verify_org_access() in deps.py correctly returns 404 to prevent info-leak.
critical_code_review_comments: deps.py:117-123 verify_org_access() correctly returns 404 (not 403) preventing existence leak via status-code differentiation. Good security posture.

deps.py:121-122 short-circuits if either user_org or doc_org is empty. This is OK for legacy data, but be aware that a user with empty organization_id would bypass isolation. Consider hardening: enforce organization_id on user records and reject tokens missing 'org'.
Export endpoint /api/export/ativos correctly filters by org (verified via openpyxl parse - no foreign IDs/names leaked).
List endpoints (/api/ativos, /api/ordens-servico, /api/estoque, /api/sectors, /api/inspecoes) all return strictly org-scoped results - tenant isolation is solid across all CRUD resources tested.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Test consumes pre-seeded ATIVO/OS/ESTOQUE per org provided by main agent. Test is fully read-only (GET only) and idempotent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://procure-manutrix.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration38_multitenant_isolation.py -v . Test is parametrized across 6 cross-org ativos pairs, 6 cross-org OS pairs and 4 cross-org estoque pairs plus self-access and list-isolation suites. All IDs are hardcoded - if main agent reseeds with different IDs, update constants at top of file (ASTEC_ATIVO, VALE_ATIVO, CSN_ATIVO, ASTEC_OS, etc.). Export test parses XLSX via openpyxl (already installed).
